name: WP-W3-pii-error-logging: remove minor-PII from logs and Sentry (error/observability path)
description: W3 (PII-handling, minor-PII egress) — never emit raw minor-derived text via logger.*, captureException extras, or Sentry breadcrumbs: strip/replace extra.rawSlice / rawResponseTrunc, the fallback-catch subject forwarding, and the schema-drift logger.error(..., { rawData: event.data }) / captureException(..., { extra: { rawData: event.data } }) with redacted equivalents. Shares the four-unit scrubber discipline.
acceptanceCriteria: No minor-PII in any logger.* call, captureException extras, or Sentry breadcrumb — explicitly no rawData: event.data in logs or captureException extras on the schema-drift path (F-018); break-test on each error path; shared scrubber exported from a canonical home (bundle-level AC across the four W3 PII units). Findings: F-018 (schema-drift path logs/captures raw event payload), F-074 (truncated LLM output to Sentry extras), F-140 (raw learner subject to Sentry in a fallback catch) (3). Source of truth: _wip/identity-foundation/2026-06-09-phase-o-master-plan.md §1 WP-W3-pii-error-logging (commit 23d0c01ad)
bodyText:
Bundle brief (WP-W3-pii-error-logging)
Transcribed from the ratified Phase-O master plan §1 → "WP-W3-pii-error-logging" @ 23d0c01ad — frozen source of truth. Children are absorbed provenance (ZDX-ADR-0001): WI-608/609.
Bundle rationale
Same fix at the error/observability boundary — never emit raw minor-derived text via logger.*, captureException extras, or Sentry breadcrumbs. Covers both the Sentry-extra leaks and the schema-drift error path that logs/captures the raw event payload.
Strategy
Strip/replace extra.rawSlice / rawResponseTrunc, the fallback-catch subject forwarding, and the schema-drift logger.error(…, { rawData: event.data }) / captureException(…, { extra: { rawData: event.data } }) with redacted equivalents.
Scope
In: F-018 (schema-drift path), F-074 (truncated LLM output to Sentry extras), F-140 (raw learner subject in fallback catch). Out: payloads / step-state / LLM-provider (siblings).
Findings table
Acceptance Criteria (bundle)
No minor-PII in any logger.* call, captureException extras, or Sentry breadcrumb.
Explicitly no rawData: event.data in logs or captureException extras on the schema-drift path (F-018).
Break-test on each error path.
Risk & blast radius
S / standard — logging + error-tracker exposure. Depends on WP-W1-spine (WI-571) + WP-W2-scope-rls (WI-574).
